name: Onet Puzzle
description: Onet Puzzle is a classic tile matching puzzle game designed to relax your mind and challenge your brain. Match identical tiles and connect them with up to three lines to clear the board and win each level. Enjoy one of the best connect puzzle games with simple gameplay, smooth controls, and addictive mechanics. Perfect for fans of Onet, Mahjong connect, and tile matching games. Features: • Classic Onet gameplay – easy to learn, hard to master • Thousands of challenging levels • Brain training & focus improvement • Hint & shuffle boosters to help you win • Relaxing music and clean visuals • Play offline anytime, anywhere If you love puzzl
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
